Awesome Android Root is a comprehensive resource hub for Android rooting enthusiasts. It curates over 500 top root apps, Magisk, KernelSU, and LSPosed modules, along with detailed rooting guides for various devices. The repository aims to be the ultimate destination for discovering and managing tools and information related to rooting Android devices.

рҹ”— рқ—ҹрқ—ңрқ—Ўрқ—һрқ—Ұ
вҖў рқ—ҡрқ—¶рқҳҒрқ—ӣрқҳӮрқ—Ҝ: https://github.com/awesome-android-root/awesome-android-root

Reversecore MCP is an enterprise-grade server that integrates over 50 analysis tools to enable AI agents to perform advanced security tasks like reverse engineering, malware analysis, and vulnerability research through natural language commands. It acts as a bridge, translating human intent into complex, multi-tool security analysis workflows.

These skills enable developers to easily add complex functionalities to their AI agents, streamlining development and interaction with Google's ecosystem.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

whichllm is a command-line tool that helps users find and run the best-performing Large Language Models (LLMs) locally on their specific hardware. It benchmarks models based on real-world performance and hardware compatibility, rather than just parameter count, providing a ranked list of suitable LLMs.

вқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖ
